title: Phase I3 — Production Reliability Design Compliance Matrix

deliverables.name: 01_reliability_protocols.py
checks: 4 typing.Protocols defined: IFailoverOrchestrator, IDisasterRecovery, IRollingUpdateManager, IRuntimeMigrator
16 abstract methods across 4 protocols (4 methods each)
All methods include recovery_trace_id: str parameter
All return types are Dict[str, Any] with documented keys
All protocols reference I1 HAOrchestrator, I2 DataMigrator, and Deterministic Rollout Guard
deliverables.evidence: IFailoverOrchestrator (4), IDisasterRecovery (4), IRollingUpdateManager (4), IRuntimeMigrator (4) = 16 total methods

deliverables.name: 02_recovery_and_update_models.py
checks: 11 enums defined: FailoverPhase, IsolationMode, PromotionGuardResult, RecoveryPointStatus, DRState, UpdateStrategy, UpdatePhase, RollbackReason, MigrationPhase, SwitchStrategy, RolloutDecision
10 dataclasses defined: RecoveryPoint, FailoverPlan, UpdateStrategy, MigrationManifest, ClusterHealthReport, FencingAction, JournalReplayState, CompatibilityMatrix, DryRunResult
All models include recovery_trace_id: str
RecoveryPoint includes state_snapshot_hash, journal_offset, combined_checksum (LAW 8 RULE 1)
FailoverPlan includes quorum_votes, lease_expiry, data_sync_lag_ms (LAW 20 RULE 3)
deliverables.evidence: 11 enums, 10 dataclasses covering failover, DR, update, migration

deliverables.name: 03_reliability_state_machine.md
checks: Core Reliability SM: 8 states (HEALTHY, FAILURE_DETECTED, QUORUM_CHECK, ISOLATE_NODE, PROMOTE_REPLICA, SYNC_STATE, RECOVERY_POINT, RESTORE_REPLAY)
13 transitions defined: R1-R12 with guard conditions
Rolling Update Sub-Machine: 4 states, 6 transitions U1-U6
Migration Sub-Machine: 4 states, 7 transitions M1-M7
13 Safety Guards defined: G-R1-G-R8 (Core), G-U1-G-U2 (Update), G-M1-G-M2 (Migration)
Deterministic Rollout Guard with SHA-256 formula and decision table
All transitions reference Canon LAW/RULE explicitly
deliverables.evidence: 8+4+4 states, 13+6+7 transitions, 13+2 guards, Deterministic Rollout Guard

deliverables.name: 04_integration_blueprint.md
checks: Architecture diagram with I3→I1→I2→F2→F4 layers
6 detailed data flows with recovery_trace_id: Failover, Promote, Recovery Point, DR Restore, Rolling Update, Migration
Correlation ID hierarchy: mission_trace_id → infra_trace_id → data_trace_id → recovery_trace_id
recovery_trace_id generation rule with SHA-256
6 event hooks: FailoverTriggered, RecoveryPointCreated, UpdateRolledBack, MigrationCompleted, SplitBrainDetected, DRRestoreStarted
Acceptance criteria: latency budgets, idempotency, zero-data-loss thresholds, rollback on failure
Compliance mapping summary table to LAW/RULE
deliverables.evidence: 6 data flows, 6 event hooks, ID hierarchy, acceptance criteria

deliverables.name: 05_canon_compliance_matrix.json
checks: All 5 design deliverables validated
Zero NON_COMPLIANT or NOT_FOUND entries
100% COMPLIANT status achieved
All deliverables link to specific LAW/RULE references

stop_conditions.condition: All 5 design deliverables exist at artifacts/design/i3/
RecoveryPoint model includes recovery_trace_id, state_snapshot_hash, checksum (LAW 8 + LAW 12)
stop_conditions.evidence: RecoveryPoint dataclass: point_id, timestamp_ns, state_snapshot_hash, journal_offset, combined_checksum, recovery_trace_id

stop_conditions.condition: Safety Guards prevent Promote Replica without quorum > 50% or data_sync_lag < threshold
stop_conditions.evidence: G-R3 (guard_promote_safe): quorum_votes > total_nodes/2 AND data_sync_lag < 500ms AND checksum_match AND lease_revoked

stop_conditions.condition: Integration Blueprint ties to I1/I2 boundaries and RULE 4 (Everything is Killable/Rollback-safe)
stop_conditions.evidence: §2 Flow 1-6 maps I3→I1→I2→F2→F4; §5 Rollback on Failure table covers all failure modes

stop_conditions.condition: Zero modifications to core/ or tests/

LAW-3.evidence: Deterministic Rollout Guard §5, G-U1 guard_canary_ready, G-M1 guard_dry_run_passed

LAW-8.description: Recoverability — all state transitions MUST be recoverable
LAW-8.evidence: 8-state Core SM every path returns to HEALTHY; G-R3 guard_promote_safe; RecoveryPoint with checksum; Journal replay

LAW-11.evidence: All protocols use instance-scoped methods; models are dataclasses with no shared mutable state

LAW-20.evidence: G-R1 guard_health_degraded (heartbeat + quorum + anomaly); G-R2 guard_quorum_integrity (2-node confirmation); G-U2 guard_rollback_required

LAW-21.evidence: G-R2 quorum integrity prevents cascading false alarm; G-R3 requires lease_revoked before promote; §4 event hooks for failover/dr/update

LAW-22.evidence: G-R4 (guard_quorum_lost) isolates leader without quorum; G-R5 (fencing) isolates failed node; RULE 4 in isolate_node protocol

RULE-1.evidence: Deterministic Rollout Guard (SHA-256 formula); RecoveryPoint.state_snapshot_hash; DryRunResult deterministic; G-R7 checksum verification

RULE-2.evidence: replay_journal reads from I2 DistributedLog only; snapshot_state is read-only; restore_from_backup controlled path

RULE-3.evidence: 13 Safety Guards (G-R1-G-R8, G-U1-G-U2, G-M1-G-M2) with explicit pass/fail conditions

RULE-4.evidence: G-R5 fencing isolation; G-R4 quorum lost isolation; RULE 4 in isolate_node, switch_over, roll_forward protocols

RULE-5.evidence: R6-R8 recovery paths in Core SM; G-U2 rollback on failure; M4 switch-over rollback; §5 Rollback on Failure table
